message.text: On an old twitch account this time

it's hot asf where i am. it's close to 80 here and then after tomorrow its gonna go back to freezing and snowing. Weather cant make up its mind
i see you got a Crazy Beefy PC. i'm a PC Nerd i love seeing people have there Specs in there panels
Softu what’s the weather like on your side?
I've had my PC for almost 2 years. i currently run a Intel i5-13600K with only 6 Cores 12 Threads No E-Cores, 32gb of Ram DDR5 6000MHz, and a RTX 3060 12gb Overclocked
I'm a Desktop Pet on VRChat. i don't own a Headset sadly
i've been thinking of switching to AMD tho. Because this CPU is a Toaster Oven. it likes to hit 100'C sometimes
My dream build is AMD Ryzen 5 9600X, and AMD RX 6950 XT 16gb. Just for those two items over $1000
i upgraded from AM3+ i had Intel i5-4570K, 32gb of DDR3, and a GTX 1650 4gb.
Your Pc desk was getting dusty did you clean it then?

There was one moment during the time of upgrading my old PC died and i was like 4 months away from upgrading. and so i was stuck with DDR2 PC Build which was Intel Pentium 4, 8gb of DDR2, and my RTX 3060. IT WAS PAINFUL
My 3060 couldn't carry any games with the Pentium 4 cooking a steak
Now ill take it up to 5090
So big question, You a Windows 10 User, or Windows 11 or Linux?
You haven’t seen my video edits yet, right? the ones i made in Adobe premiere and AE have you seen them?
i miss Windows XP, and Windows 7
i tried to install Windows XP on my PC. it kept giving me the Blue screen. Since Windows XP can't handle 32gb of Ram
I’m sending the drive in Dm it’s uploading, showing 209mb so it’ll take about 10 to 15 minutes to finish lol
